scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.pages:build: npm run build -w shared && VITE_BUILD_ID=${CF_PAGES_COMMIT_SHA:-local-dev} npm run build -w client
scripts.android:twa:update: npm run android:twa:sync && node scripts/run_bubblewrap.mjs update --manifest android/twa-manifest.json --directory android --skipVersionUpgrade
scripts.android:twa:build: npm run android:twa:sync && node scripts/run_bubblewrap.mjs build --manifest android/twa-manifest.json --directory android
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w shared && npm run lint -w worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w worker
